roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT NOTICE OF COMPLETION OF DUI PROGRAM RECIEVED
DEFT NOTICE OF ENROLLMENT TO 3MO DUI PROGRAM RECEIVED

/CAL SENTENCE/X NO CONTEST PLEA IN COUNT 2 IS WITHDRAWN AND THE GUILTY FIDING IS SET ASIDE,/AMEND:TO ADD A COUNT 3- 23103 VC A MISDEMEANOR WITHIN THE MEANING OF 23103,5 VC/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZRTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/TWS/CH3:ISS:CPROB:PROB 18 M:PJ 1D/CTS:1/PF145 18/VF2:150/FOP1:3 MONTH/LCHEM/LVAL/COMUN:20/X:DEFENDANT HAS COMPLETED THE FIRST OFFENDER PROGRAM AND 20 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/

/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/ARBUCKLE/CTORD:SENTENCING BE STAYED PENDING SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF FIRST OFFENDERS PROGRAN AND 20 HOURS COMMUNITY SERVICE WITHIN 6 MONTHS OF TODAYS DATE, IFSUCCESSFUL THEN DEFENDANT WILL BE SENTENCED TO A 23013VC WITHIN THE MEANINGOF 23103,5VC A MISDEMEANOR/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: LAW CLERK, EMILY HARBAUGH, SUPERVISED BY PD CHRISTOPHER GARCIA/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THEDEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/GTWM/987,2/X: MVARS PROTECTIVE ORDER FILED AND SERVED/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DAWF/
/CAL PRETRIAL/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 16/TRANS 16 FORTHWITH FOR DISPOSITION/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & MTS/DAWT/CONT/X:THE DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE ISWAIVED UNLESS DISPO/
